channel.title: vishalv.com
channel.description: Personal website of Vishal V, featuring writing, ideas, projects, and research

item.title: Bets on Post-GPU Compute
item.description: Post-GPU compute is a bet that new hardware will make different primitives cheap. When the primitive changes, the winning model classes change. Extropic is a bet that sampling becomes that primitive.
item.author: vishalvignesh.iitm@gmail.com (Vishal V)

item.title: PGMs, EBMs, Sampling
item.description: Connecting probabilistic graphical models to energy-based formulations, and showing how sampling replaces optimization as the core mechanism for inference and computation.
item.author: vishalvignesh.iitm@gmail.com (Vishal V)

item.title: Zotero iOS System Design
item.description: System design evaluation of the Zotero iOS client based on long-term usage as a knowledge power user tool. Zotero is an open-source reference manager widely used in academic and research workflows.
item.author: vishalvignesh.iitm@gmail.com (Vishal V)

item.title: The Cost of Convenience
item.description: I finally deleted my WordPress setup and replaced it with a system I actually control. Markdown, Git, Next.js and Contentlayer now run the show and this stack will survive anything because it is simple, portable and mine.
item.author: vishalvignesh.iitm@gmail.com (Vishal V)
